title: Bank of England, FCA launch consultation on tokenized UK wholesale markets
message_html: Bank of England, FCA launch consultation on tokenized UK wholesale markets ...
snippet: UK regulators seek industry feedback on tokenized securities, collateral, and settlement infrastructure with a July 3 deadline.

title: Standard Chartered projects $4T in tokenized assets by end-2028, with DeFi protocols primary beneficiaries
message_html: Standard Chartered projects $4T in tokenized assets by end-2028, with DeFi protocols primary beneficiaries ...
snippet: Standard Chartered projects $4 trillion in tokenized assets by the end of 2028, with DeFi protocols positioned to benefit most.

title: Digital Assets Clearing Center secures $10 million investment
message_html: Digital Assets Clearing Center secures $10 million investment ...
snippet: Digital Asset Clearing Center (DACC.HK), a next-generation financial market infrastructure for the tokenized economy, today announced US$10 million in funding from strategic partners including Conflux, Transaction Technologies Limited (“TTL”) and Global InfoTech.

title: AFX launches sovereign Layer 1, providing an optimized execution environment for on-chain perp DEXes
message_html: AFX launches sovereign Layer 1, providing an optimized execution environment for on-chain perp DEXes ...
snippet: AFX, a sovereign Layer 1 purpose-built for decentralized derivatives trading, has officially commenced the operation of its L1 Mainnet, signaling a definitive end to the era of trade execution compromised by general-purpose blockchain congestion.
